description:
Fol. 8r: Remnant of a letter or possibly state document in Arabic script. The ends of two lines are preserved: ...لعبك من الخاصة...
Fol. 8v: Order of payment in the hand of Abū Zikrī Kohen: Abū l-Ḥasan al-Hod is to give the bearer 1 raṭl of rose and lemon syrup.
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
